things.name: Turning Torso
things.description: Scandinavia's tallest building, Santiago Calatrava's iconic twisted skyscraper

things.name: Western Harbour (Vastra Hamnen)
things.description: Sustainable urban development showcase with striking modern architecture

things.name: Malmo Castle (Malmohus)
things.description: 15th-century castle housing history, art and natural history museums

things.name: Old Town (Gamla Staden)
things.description: Charming medieval core with Stortorget square and the beautifully preserved Lilla Torg

things.name: Oresund Bridge
things.description: Iconic 8km bridge-tunnel connecting Malmo to Copenhagen over the Oresund strait

things.name: Moderna Museet Malmo
things.description: Satellite of Stockholm's Moderna Museet in a renovated power station

things.name: Stortorget
things.description: Vast market square with the statue of King Karl X Gustav and City Hall

things.name: Pildammsparken
things.description: Large city park with a theatre, sculpture garden and lake

things.name: St Peter's Church
things.description: Magnificent 14th-century brick Gothic church with medieval frescoes

things.name: Malmo Food Hall (Saluhallen)
things.description: Historic covered market with the best of Swedish and Mediterranean produce
